name: signaldock
description: Real-time developer notifications beyond terminal exit codes

signalDock.bridgePortType.title: Bridge Port Type
signalDock.bridgePortType.description: Port on which SignalDock transmits workflow events. Using Auto helps enable seemless SideKick connection without QR Scan.

signalDock.bridgePort.title: Bridge Port
signalDock.bridgePort.description: If you want to use a custom port, then select Custom in Bridge Port Type setting.

signalDock.bridgePassword.title: Bridge Password
signalDock.bridgePassword.description: If you are on a public WiFi network, I recommened setting a password so that only your Sidekicks can connect to bridge but this disables automatic connection, you need to scan qr code once per Sidekick. Leave empty for private or home network.

signalDock.enableTerminalNotifier.title: Enable Terminal focussed notifications
signalDock.enableTerminalNotifier.description: Be notified of when a long running command finishes.

signalDock.terminalNotifierWaitTime.title: Terminal Notifier Wait Time
signalDock.terminalNotifierWaitTime.description: Sends a notification to your desktop and SideKicks only when a terminal command takes more than speicified seconds of time to finish, default is 60 seconds.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
